Alternatively, starting later might mean fewer orders overall because I'm missing some time slots. But since my performance was average yesterday, maybe a change is needed. Perhaps adjusting to start an hour or two later and finish earlier could optimize my earnings.

I think shifting my working hours to 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM gives me more flexibility during peak times without being on the road too early when demand might be lower. This way, I can focus on periods where orders are more frequent, potentially improving my rankings.
